evaluating-multiple-constraints.description: How to systematically evaluate prompts with more than one instruction.

evaluating-text-additions.description: Guidelines for evaluating the addition or modification of text in images.

evaluating-style-transfers.description: Guidelines for evaluating artistic style transfers and thematic changes.

visual-question-answering.description: Ask specific questions about the visual content of the source and edited images to verify constraints.

image-difference-checker.description: Compare a source image and an edited image to list all additions, removals, and modifications.
